title: Person title like Dr/PhD
excerpt: We name our users with their title because we need this information for the docugen output: Example: ‘Dr. Jon Doe’. However, monday perceives ‘Dr,’ as pre-name in all follow up communication and dashboards… It would be g…

posts.author: marco (Marco Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: We name our users with their title because we need this information for the docugen output: Example: ‘Dr. Jon Doe’. However, monday perceives ‘Dr,’ as pre-name in all follow up communication and dashboards… It would be great to set a title that actually appears in the users name, but let the system know what the real pre-name is.
